version_description: Full chords in the original key of B major.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[ch]F#add11[/ch] - 244302
[ch]Bmaj7/D#[/ch] - xx1302
[ch]F#7add11[/ch] - 244300
[tab][ch]E6[/ch] - x22120
--[/tab]

[Intro]
[ch]B[/ch] [ch]F#add11[/ch] [ch]G#m[/ch] [ch]E6[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                       [ch]F#add11[/ch]
 Did you really beam me up[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bmaj7/D#[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]
 In a cloud of sparkling dust[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B[/ch]
 Just to do experiments on[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F#add11[/ch]
 Tell me I'm the chosen one[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Bmaj7/D#[/ch]
 Show me that this world is bigger than us[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]E[/ch]
 Then sent me back where I came from[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
 For a moment, I knew cosmic love[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]N.C.     [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
 Now I'm down bad crying at the gym[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F#7add11[/ch]
 Everything comes out teenage petulance[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G#m[/ch]
 Fuck it if I can't have him[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]E6[/ch]
 I might just die, it would make no difference[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
 Down bad, waking up in blood[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F#7add11[/ch]
 Staring at the sky, come back and pick me up[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G#m[/ch]
 Fuck it, if I can't have us[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]E6[/ch]                                  [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
 I might just not get up, I might stay down bad[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F#7add11[/ch]                     [ch]G#m[/ch]
 Fuck it if I can't have him, down bad[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E6[/ch]
 Fuck it if I can't have him[/tab]


[verse 2]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                        [ch]F#add11[/ch]
 Did you take all my old clothes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bmaj7/D#[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]
 Just to leave me here naked and alone[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]B[/ch]
 In a field in my same old town[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]F#add11[/ch]
 That somehow seems so hollow now[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Bmaj7/D#[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
 They'll say I'm nuts if I talk about the existence of you[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
 For a moment I was heavenstruck[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
 Now I'm down bad crying at the gym[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F#7add11[/ch]
 Everything comes out teenage petulance[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G#m[/ch]
 Fuck it if I can't have him (Fuck it, if I can't have)[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]E6[/ch]
 I might just die, it would make no difference[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
 Down bad, waking up in blood[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F#7add11[/ch]
 Staring at the sky, come back and pick me up[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G#m[/ch]
 Fuck it, if I can't have us[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]E6[/ch]                                  [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
 I might just not get up, I might stay down bad (Like I lost my twin)[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F#7add11[/ch]                     [ch]G#m[/ch]
 Fuck it if I can't have him, down bad (Waving at the ship)[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E6[/ch]
 Fuck it if I can't have him[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Bsus2[/ch]                     [ch]F#add11[/ch]
 I loved you hostile takeovers,[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]G#m[/ch]
 Encounters closer and closer[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]E6[/ch]
 All your indescent exposures[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
 How dare you say that it's...[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]F#add11[/ch]
 I'll build you a fort on some planet[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]G#m[/ch]
 Where they can all understand it[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]E6[/ch]
 How dare you think it's romantic[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
 Leaving me safe and stranded[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F#add11[/ch]               [ch]G#m[/ch]
 'Cause fuck it I was in love[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E6[/ch]                           [ch]Bsus2[/ch] [ch]F#add11[/ch] [ch]G#m[/ch]
 So fuck you if I can't have us[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E6[/ch]
 'Cause fuck it I was in love[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
 Now I'm down bad crying at the gym[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F#7add11[/ch]
 Everything comes out teenage petulance[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G#m[/ch]
 Fuck it if I can't have him (Fuck it, if I can't have)[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]E6[/ch]
 I might just die, it would make no difference[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
 Down bad, waking up in blood[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F#7add11[/ch]
 Staring at the sky, come back and pick me up[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G#m[/ch]
 Fuck it, if I can't have us[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]E6[/ch]                                  [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
 I might just not get up, I might stay down bad (Like I lost my twin)[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F#7add11[/ch]                     [ch]G#m[/ch]
 Fuck it if I can't have him, down bad (Waving at the ship)[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E6[/ch]
 Fuck it if I can't have him[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]Bsus2[/ch]
Like I lost my twin[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#7add11[/ch]
Fuck it if I can't have him[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
Down bad (Waving at the ship)[/tab]
[tab][ch]E6[/ch]
Fuck it if I can't have him[/tab]
